title: Eva 10th Anniversary WAVE Figure
wikitext:
[]: Eva 10th Anniversary WAVE Figure             Quote Post by bis2501 » Wed Sep 07, 2005 8:03 am Or rather, figurettes :) :) WAVE (Japan) is releasing 2 PVC figures in December to commemorate Evangelion's 10th Anniversary: A-03 Sachiel-XX A-14 Zeruel-XX No, they are not Angels, but "Apostles". Certainly look really interesting to me :o :o They stand at about 14cm each I think and cost about 5000Yen for the pair (not including shipping yet of course). Here's a look at the figure designs at Japanese Site Nodo-ya (Japanese text, sorry - I havent found any English sites about them): [url]http://www.noda-ya.com/html/syohin/figure/02000461.htm[/url] Oh & hi, have been visiting Eva Monkey quite often for the news & well-researched information and this is my first post at the forums. Nice to meet you all

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Wed Sep 07, 2005 8:40 am Welcome! And those figures are weird... :S

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 07, 2005 2:08 pm There seem to be four pictures floating around in that style Sachiel, Zeruel, Tabis and Lilith, respectively... I suppose the other Shito were just insufficiently humanoid in form.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Sep 07, 2005 2:55 pm Are there any real pics of them figures?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 07, 2005 10:04 pm Why do the Tabris and Lilim ones look "off"?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 08, 2005 3:25 pm I didn't realize that one of Tabris' traits was floating around without pants.

Article: Eva 10th Anniversary WAVE Figure
[]: Eva 10th Anniversary WAVE Figure             Quote Post by bis2501 » Wed Sep 07, 2005 8:03 am Or rather, figurettes :) :) WAVE (Japan) is releasing 2 PVC figures in December to commemorate Evangelion's 10th Anniversary: A-03 Sachiel-XX A-14 Zeruel-XX No, they are not Angels, but "Apostles". Certainly look really interesting to me :o :o They stand at about 14cm each I think and cost about 5000Yen for the pair (not including shipping yet of course). Here's a look at the figure designs at Japanese Site Nodo-ya (Japanese text, sorry - I havent found any English sites about them): [url]http://www.noda-ya.com/html/syohin/figure/02000461.htm[/url] Oh & hi, have been visiting Eva Monkey quite often for the news & well-researched information and this is my first post at the forums. Nice to meet you all
